headline: Which Big-Box Store Chain Has Dominated 2026: Walmart, Target, or Costco?

That run has turned the longtime laggard into the surprise leader of the big-box pack in 2026. By comparison, Walmart (NASDAQ:WMT) stock is up 18% year to date and ... headline: Parafin Expands Warehouse Credit Facility With Silicon Valley Bank, EverBank, and Trinity Capital
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 05, 2026--Parafin, a leading embedded financial infrastructure company recently named to the 2026 Forbes Fintech 50, today announced the renewal and upsizing of its warehouse credit facility. With Silicon Valley Bank, a division of First Citizens Bank (SVB); EverBank, which joins as a new A-note lender; and Trinity Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIN), the expanded facility increases Parafin’s borrowing capacity and reduces its cost of capital.

headline: Ooma Launches MyPhone, a Modern Landline for Kids as Parents Delay Smartphones
summary: SUNNYVALE, Calif., May 05, 2026--Ooma, Inc. (NYSE: OOMA), a smart communications platform for businesses and consumers, today announced the launch of MyPhoneTM, a modern landline designed specifically for families with kids, with availability beginning nationwide on Walmart.com and expanding to Walmart stores across the country in the coming months.

headline: 'The stock market is not the economy,' says Rebecca Homkes
summary: Strategist Rebecca Homkes weighs in on the broader impacts of the Iran War, warning against trying to correlate U.S. equity indices with the economy and exploring the real impact of AI on the labor market.
